2605.23478.title: PhenoYieldNet: Learning Crop-Aware Phenological Responses for Multi-Crop Yield Prediction
2605.23478.paper_summary: Accurate crop yield prediction is crucial for sustainable agriculture and global food security. While existing methods are predominantly developed for single-crop prediction, they often struggle to generalize across diverse crop types, without addressing the unique crop phenological responses that are dynamically modulated by complex weather patterns. In this paper, we propose PhenoYieldNet, a multi-crop yield prediction framework that learns crop-specific phenology by explicitly modeling their responses with temporal drivers. Specifically, we develop a crop-aware temporal decoder consisting of a Crop Phenology Bank (CPB) and a Crop Phenology Attention (CPA) module. The CPB integrates a set of learnable embeddings, which leverage a query to guide the CPA module to learn the most relevant phenology patterns for the specific crop. And the CPA module explicitly captures multi-scale trend and variation components to construct temporal contexts, enabling the model to dynamically adjust the attention across different phenological stages. To learn robust and generalizable features for multi-crop prediction, the encoder is initialized with a pre-trained foundation model, and further adapted via a self-supervised Temporal Contrastive Adaptation strategy to align with agricultural temporal dynamics. Extensive experiments conducted on multi-crop datasets indicate that our proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, exhibiting strong generalization capabilities across different regions and crops.
2605.23478.paper_summary_zh: 準確的作物產量預測對於可持續農業和全球糧食安全至關重要。雖然現有的方法主要是針對單一作物的預測開發的，但它們在不同作物類型之間的泛化能力常常不足，且未能解決由複雜氣候模式動態調節的獨特作物物候反應。在本文中，我們提出了PhenoYieldNet，一個多作物產量預測框架，通過明確建模作物對時間驅動因素的反應來學習作物特定的物候。具體而言，我們開發了一個作物感知的時間解碼器，該解碼器由作物物候庫（CPB）和作物物候注意（CPA）模塊組成。CPB整合了一組可學習的嵌入，利用查詢引導CPA模塊學習特定作物的最相關物候模式。CPA模塊明確捕捉多尺度的趨勢和變化組件，以構建時間上下文，使模型能夠在不同的物候階段動態調整注意力。為了學習穩健且可泛化的特徵以進行多作物預測，編碼器以預訓練的基礎模型初始化，並通過自我監督的時間對比適應策略進一步調整，以與農業時間動態對齊。在多作物數據集上進行的廣泛實驗表明，我們提出的方法顯著優於最先進的方法，展現出在不同地區和作物之間的強泛化能力。
2605.23478.author: Yu Luo et.al.
2605.23478.authors: Yu Luo, Xiaogang Zhu, Shan Zeng, Wei Xiang, Thomas Francis Bishop, Zhiyong Wang, Kun Hu
